description: Dark arts manipulating the boundary between life and death — communing with spirits, raising the fallen, and inflicting decay.
abilities: Cursing a creature through touch with a debilitating affliction lasting up to one month. The sillies causes the target to behave in a carefree, out-of-character manner. Clumsiness renders their limbs awkward and unreliable, making them unable to wield weapons or hold objects. Blight prevents the target from recovering from wounds. A failed casting may cause the affliction to become contagious, and a catastrophic failure may rebound upon the caster.

Opening a telepathic channel with nearby spectral entities whose presence has been sensed. The conversation may last up to a minute, and a shared language is required. The spirits are under no compulsion to respond; if they refuse, the effort is not wasted.

Gripping a living creature and inflicting a necrotizing wound that spreads in black-green tendrils from the point of contact. The corruption deals minor damage on contact and again moments later, and the festering wounds resist all but the most potent restorative magic.

A passive awareness of nearby spiritual remnants of the dead, though not their exact positions. With effort, the sense deepens to detect where sentient creatures have died, how long ago, and the general nature of their passing: natural causes, accident, or foul play. At its greatest intensity, the caster's vision pierces the veil, revealing invisible spirit creatures in the area.
Evaluating a reasonably intact corpse through careful inspection. After a minute of study, the exact cause, time, and date of the creature's death become clear.

Cursing the heart of a lesser foe or common person through touch, causing it to detonate instantly or at a delay of up to one year. Against powerful enemies, the curse lies dormant as a tripwire: should the creature be reduced to the brink of death, its heart explodes and it perishes.

Animating a nearby corpse or skeleton as a mindless thrall, controlled telepathically. The creature can move and fight with modest capability but cannot leave the immediate area. It possesses little durability and strikes with only feeble force. The animation dissolves when the caster departs.

Merging a nearby spirit with a living host through touch. As a dark passenger, the spirit rides within the host's mind, experiencing its senses and conversing with it telepathically but unable to seize control. With far greater power, the spirit fully inhabits the body while the host's consciousness fades, leaving only fragments of memory behind. Full possession only works against powerful enemies if they are near death.

Touching a creature and withering its body as though decades have passed in an instant. The target's lifespan remains unchanged, but they experience the weight and frailty of advanced age, a creeping awareness that death lurks on the horizon, a sensation that may reshape their priorities and desires.
